span.p:
Liquidity Providers
supply currency, hold tranche shares

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Pool Admin / Manager
configures the pool, funds loans

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Pool
currency custody + reserve
+ tranche registry

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Senior tranche (id 0)
paid first, loss last

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Junior tranche (id n)
paid last, loss first

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
INavSource — value seam
totalValue() returns one net-asset-value number

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
IWaterfall — external seam (intended spec)
distribute · allocateLoss
the only component the standard specifies

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
How to read this diagram
Solid arrow = value moved or a call made.
Dashed arrow = an interface implemented.
Cash descends the tranches senior-first; loss ascends junior-first.
The boxed harness is generic and fixed; the two seams (INavSource, IWaterfall)
are the only points where a specific use case plugs in.
